headline: Does Block (SQ) Using Square to Power GOLFTEC Hint at a Deeper Upmarket Strategy Shift?
summary: In early April 2026, Square announced that GOLFTEC, the world’s largest provider of golf lessons and premium club fittings, chose Square to power unified payments and commerce across more than 200 US locations, completing implementation in just four weeks. The rollout showcases Square’s ability to handle complex, multi-location enterprise deployments that materially cut admin time, speed financial close, and reduce dispute-related costs for a large, service-centric chain. Next, we’ll assess...
